title: User job OOM kill on node01
summary: Job 891234 (alice, molecular_dynamics_run42) was killed by OOM on node01. Job requested 64G, used 64.1G. Kernel oom_kill for lammps process.
resolution: Job resubmission with higher memory request recommended. See docs/troubleshooting_oom.md
notes: User-facing diagnosis task. Evidence in slurm/job_details.json.
